creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Thanks for testing the port with 'make clean'. 

Please check you settings in /etc/make.conf 

Then rebuild all ports that graphviz can not find. 

portupgrade may have messed up the dependencies on your system. 
if you change any option, you must rebuild your index before 
you use portupgrade.
